author: Nguyễn Văn Duy
description: Hourly Red and Lavalink status panel for Discord, including bot health, latency, uptime, Audio node state, and active music rooms.
install_msg: Load with `[p]load musicstatus`, then configure a destination using `[p]musicstatus setchannel #bot-status` and verify it with `[p]musicstatus now`.
short: Persistent music-bot health and status panel.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord guild, channel, and status-message IDs required to maintain the configured status panel.
